name: Chinese-Style Spareribs
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Env. Soup Mix (Onion, Onion-Mushroom, Beefy-Mushroom, or Beefy-Onion)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the garlic.
2. Prepare one of the following soup mixes: Onion, Onion-Mushroom, Beefy-Mushroom, or Beefy-Onion.
3. Use imported soy sauce for best flavor; domestic can be used but will not taste as good.
4. Place the spareribs in a bowl and coat evenly with the beef stock mixture.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, preferably overnight.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. In a large skillet over medium heat, melt butter or margarine.
8. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
9. Stir in tomato puree, soy sauce, chili sauce, and soup mix; bring to a simmer.
10. Pour the mixture over the ribs, ensuring they are well coated.
11. Cook the ribs in the oven for approximately 2 hours or until tender.
12. Turn off heat when done.
